final_orientation.name: Reorient 20° tilt
final_orientation.rationale: Tilting reduces the 70° overhang to a manageable angle, lowering support cost.

support_strategy.removal_plan: Remove supports from accessible side; expect 8 min.

special_notes: Add cooling towers for 12 mm bridge

actions.action: Tilt part 20° to reduce overhang severity
actions.verification: No unsupported red regions in slicer preview

actions.action: Set support threshold 45° and density 15% with interface
actions.verification: Support detaches cleanly leaving surface Ra < 50 µm

test_print_plan.model: Sacrificial small section of the overhang
test_print_plan.fallback: If bridge sags > 0.3 mm, add 2 cooling towers and reduce bridge speed to 25 mm/s
